summary: Matched a substantial batch of Kirby special-move code in ftKb_SpecialN.c, centered on neutral-special inhale/capture/spit/drink animations, airborne stone IASA, and one copied-special IASA path. decomp.dev reported +3608 matched bytes, 16 new 100% matches, and fn_800F53AC improved from 0% to 98.51%. The PR also cleaned up the Kirby item distance helper it_802F23AC by giving it real Item_GObj/Vec3 types instead of raw int*/float* pointer math.

key_files.role: Primary file; added/adjusted Kirby neutral-special, stone, and copied-special functions plus static inline helpers, effect includes, ftcoll include, and several matching-oriented padding/fake-match edits.
Rewrote it_802F23AC as a typed squared-distance helper using GET_ITEM, Item.pos, Vec3, and SQ instead of manual raw pointer offsets.
Updated it_802F23AC prototype from double it_802F23AC(int*, float*) to f64 it_802F23AC(Item_GObj*, Vec3*).

what_changed: Filled previously placeholder-marked Kirby neutral-special animation functions: ftKb_SpecialN_Anim, ftKb_SpecialAirN_Anim, ftKb_SpecialNCapture0_Anim, ftKb_SpecialNCapture_Anim, ftKb_SpecialNSpit_Anim, ftKb_SpecialAirNSpit_Anim, and ftKb_SpecialNDrink_Anim.

Added shared neutral-special helpers ftKb_SpecialN_SetHitlagCb and ftKb_SpecialN_SetThrowCb to perform Fighter_ChangeMotionState, set hitlag pause/resume callbacks, and install ftCommon_8007E2D0 capture/release/throw callbacks.
Added capture-state helper ftKb_SpecialNCapture_EnterState, which changes motion state, calls ftKb_SpecialN_800F9070, and resets capture/throw state with ftCommon_8007E2F4(fp, 0x1FF).

Implemented inhale distance checks around specialn_x_offset_inhaled, specialn_y_offset_inhaled, and specialn_inhale_velocity for item and fighter targets, using it_802F23AC or ftCo_800BD19C against squared velocity thresholds before transitioning to ground or air follow-up states.
Implemented spit animation logic that releases a captured victim through ftCo_800DE2CC, ftCo_800BDB58, ftColl_8007B8CC, clears cmd_vars[0], and exits to wait or fall when animation frames end.

Implemented drink animation logic for fighter victims using ftCo_800DE2CC, ftCo_800BE000, ftCo_800BD9E0, and ftKb_SpecialN_800F1BAC; also adjusted Drink0/Drink1 variants with getFighter and PAD_STACK for matching.

Added ftKb_SpecialAirLw_IASA using the existing stone timer test as fbKb_SpecialLw_IASA_Inline, preserving fp->x221C_b4 across Fighter_ChangeMotionState to ftKb_MS_SpecialAirLwEnd and spawning effect 0x49C.

Added fn_800F53AC at near-match quality: it spawns/cleans up Kirby hat item state via it_802ADC54/it_802ADC34, stores x1984_heldItemSpec, validates death2_cb with OSReport/__assert strings, sets Kirby damage callbacks, and spawns ground/air effects 0x496/0x497.

Added fn_800F9260_DrMario helper that builds a candidate list excluding the previous two pill choices, uses HSD_Randi, updates fv.kb.x68/x6C, and spawns It_Kind_Kirby_DrMarioVitamin with itDrMarioPill_Spawn.
Matched ftKb_CaSpecialAirN_IASA, computing airborne copied-special momentum from left-stick Y, Kirby dat attrs specialn_ca_* ranges, sinf/cosf, and facing_dir.

Improved smaller already-near-matching functions including fn_800F21E8, ftKb_SpecialN_800F5DE8, ftKb_SpecialN_800F5EA8, ftKb_SpecialAirNDrink_Anim, fn_800F98F4, ftKb_SpecialNDrink0_Anim, and ftKb_SpecialNDrink1_Anim.
Added includes for efasync.h, ftcoll.h, itCommonItems.h, itdrmariopill.h, and itmariofireball.h to support newly decompiled effect, collision, and item calls.
smart_moves: Retyping it_802F23AC to Item_GObj* and Vec3* removed unsafe casts at Kirby callsites and made the squared-distance logic readable while preserving f64 return behavior.
Factoring repeated ground/air neutral-special setup into static inline helpers kept paired functions structurally similar but still allowed per-state motion IDs and callback choices.
The PR preserved callback assignment order through ftKirbyDmgInline and ftKirbyDmgInline2, which matters for matching when death2_cb and take_dmg_cb are assigned in different orders.
Effect spawning was tied to the same state bits and hitlag callbacks used by related fighter code: x2219_b0/x2222_b2 plus efLib_PauseAll and efLib_ResumeAll.
Distance comparisons stayed in squared-distance space, matching the helper contract and avoiding unnecessary sqrt-style logic.
The diff uses small, explicit matching aids such as PAD_STACK, u8 padding arrays, fake self-assignment, and an empty fake-match branch rather than hiding them in unclear control flow.
decomp_lessons: Do not normalize GET_FIGHTER versus getFighter blindly; this PR deliberately uses both forms in different functions for codegen/register allocation.
When a raw-pointer helper's true data types become clear from callsites, update the header and implementation together; this can remove casts and improve several caller matches.
For paired ground/air action-state functions, static inline helpers with a motion-state parameter can express shared game logic without sacrificing matching.
Preserve stack shape explicitly in stubborn functions. PAD_STACK(16/20/24) and u8 _pad arrays were used repeatedly to reach 100% matches.
Small fake-match constructs are sometimes necessary and should be documented in-line, as with the empty check on specialhi_projectile_spawn_x and the self-assignment to facing_dir.
Callback order can be semantically equivalent but codegen-distinct; the two Kirby damage inline helpers intentionally assign death2_cb and take_dmg_cb in opposite orders.
Keep item/fighter capture flows separated until evidence supports merging: item inhale uses it_802F23AC/it_802F2810, while fighter inhale uses ftCo_800BD19C/ftCo_800BD620.
naming_conventions: Kirby fighter functions keep the ftKb_ prefix and action-state suffixes such as _Anim, _IASA, _Phys, and _Coll.
Aerial action-state variants use SpecialAir in the symbol name, e.g. ftKb_SpecialAirN_Anim, ftKb_SpecialAirLw_IASA, and ftKb_CaSpecialAirN_IASA.
Address-based unknowns remain fn_800Fxxxx, but local static inline helpers add descriptive suffixes such as _SpawnEffect, _CleanupItem, _DrMario, _SetHitlagCb, and _SetThrowCb.
Kirby dat attrs are typed as ftKb_DatAttrs* and fields follow move-family prefixes: specialn_*, speciallw_*, specialhi_*, and specialn_ca_*.
Item helper naming stays address-based for it_802F23AC, but its signature now uses project types Item_GObj* and Vec3*.

The code consistently uses fp for Fighter*, item_gobj for Item_GObj*, victim_gobj for captured fighters, pos for Vec3, and part enums such as FtPart_YRotN, FtPart_HipN, FtPart_R3rdNa, and FtPart_LHandN.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used PAD_STACK(16), PAD_STACK(20), PAD_STACK(24), and explicit u8 _pad arrays to reproduce stack layout.
Changed fn_800F21E8 from a temporary var_f1 branch to a facing_dir ternary and added an empty fake-match branch on specialhi_projectile_spawn_x.
Kept a documented comma-operator/regalloc trick in ftKb_SpecialAirHi3_Phys and adjusted parentheses around specialhi_horizontal_momentum.
Used fake self-assignment fp->facing_dir = fp->facing_dir after capture transitions, explicitly marked as permuter-discovered fake match.
Introduced otherwise redundant temporaries such as new_fp/new_var and reordered assignments to influence register allocation.
Moved inline helpers earlier in the file and made them static inline where callsite inlining/order mattered.
Used SQ(...) macros for squared thresholds and item/fighter distance calculations, matching the original no-sqrt behavior.
For ftKb_CaSpecialAirN_IASA, retained exact float constants and math calls, including 0.017453292f, sinf, and cosf.
review_feedback: No human review comments or PR body text were present in the slice, so reviewer intent is weakly evidenced.
decomp-dev bot reported matched code 60.48% overall, +0.09%, +3608 bytes for GALE01.

Bot report listed 16 new 100% matches in main/melee/ft/chara/ftKirby/ftKb_SpecialN, including ftKb_SpecialN_Anim, ftKb_SpecialAirN_Anim, ftKb_SpecialNCapture0_Anim, ftKb_SpecialNCapture_Anim, ftKb_SpecialAirLw_IASA, ftKb_CaSpecialAirN_IASA, ftKb_SpecialNDrink_Anim, ftKb_SpecialNSpit_Anim, and ftKb_SpecialAirNSpit_Anim.
Bot report also listed fn_800F53AC as improved from 0.00% to 98.51%, not fully matched.
PR was squash-merged after the automated match report; no explicit review rationale was captured.
follow_up_queries: Finish fn_800F53AC from 98.51% to 100%, focusing on item cleanup/spawn, OSReport/__assert callback checks, and effect callback ordering.
Investigate fn_800F9260 after the added fn_800F9260_DrMario helper; this PR did not have a bot-reported full match for the parent function.
Search later PRs for ftKb_SpecialLw_Coll, ftKb_SpecialAirLw_Coll, and end-coll placeholder cleanup around Kirby stone.
Audit remaining it_802F23AC callers for stale raw int*/float* casts after the Item_GObj*/Vec3* header change.
Reuse the ftKb_SpecialN_SetHitlagCb and ftKb_SpecialN_SetThrowCb pattern when matching other paired ground/air capture-start animations.
